name: echora
description: Echora is a VS Code extension that empowers your CLI agent with STT/TTS and makes it your best companion — chatting, learning, and working, always echoing to you.

echora.nodeSpeech.locale.description: Preferred locale for voice input recognition. Use 'auto' to follow VS Code UI language, or set e.g. 'zh-CN', 'en-US'.

echora.stt.sessionDurationMs.description: Maximum duration (ms) for a voice input session. Set to 0 to disable auto-stop (future VAD mode). Default: 20000.

enumDescriptions: Use Claude Agent SDK for real AI responses.
Mock consumer for local smoke testing.
echora.pipeline.textConsumer.description: Text consumer backend for the voice pipeline. Use 'agent-sdk' for Claude Agent SDK integration, or 'mock' for local smoke tests.

echora.pipeline.remote.markdownDescription: **[Experimental]** Enable remote bridge for the voice pipeline. This feature is under development. Format: `wsl:<distro>` (e.g. `wsl:Ubuntu`) or `ssh:<host>`. Leave empty to run locally.

echora.pipeline.enableTextEditingBeforeS.description: When enabled, final voice transcription enters a review state in Echora sidebar and only sends after you click Send. When disabled (default), final transcription is sent immediately.

echora.pipeline.systemPrompt.markdownDescription: Custom system prompt prepended to every voice message. Leave empty to use the built-in default (concise, voice-optimized style). Overridden by `#echora.pipeline.systemPromptFile#` or a `.echora/prompt.md` file in the workspace root.

echora.pipeline.systemPromptFile.markdownDescription: Path to a `.md` file containing the system prompt. Relative paths resolve from workspace root. Takes priority over `#echora.pipeline.systemPrompt#` and `.echora/prompt.md`.

scripts.pretest: pnpm run compile-tests && pnpm run compile && pnpm run lint
